creator: W.J.Zwart@NescioLudens.nl
text:
I approve this patch, thanks Eric!
However, in the meantime 4.3.4 has been released, so a next patch will
come shortly

Willem Jaap
Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> and a committer will take care of it.
